name: MINERS-Social-Responder

parameters.text: Great! 🎉 What type of post?
No worries — skipping today's post. See you next time! 👋
🖼 Picture it is! How would you like the image?
🎬 Got it — a video post! 📷 Send me one photo of the dish or scene and I'll animate it into a short social video. ⏱ Generation takes about 60–90 seconds — I'll send it as soon as it's ready.

=✅ Post approved and saved!

📝 Your caption — copy this:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
{{ $('Fetch Approved Row').item.json.caption }}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Post the content above with this caption wherever you like. You're all set! 🚀
No problem — cancelled this post. Catch you next time! 👋
📷 Great — send me the photo you'd like to post and I'll enhance it for you.

parameters.jsCode:
const parts = $input.first().json?.content?.parts ?? [];
return [{ json: { caption: parts[0]?.text ?? '' } }];

additionalFields.caption: =🖼 Here's your {{ $('Build Image Prompt').item.json.theme }} image. 📝 Caption preview: {{ $('Extract Caption (Gen)').item.json.caption }} Happy with it?

parameters.text: ⚠️ No active session found — please wait for the next scheduled prompt or start fresh.

You are a professional video director for The Miners Arms, a British pub in West Bromwich. Analyse this image in exhaustive detail and return ONLY valid minified JSON in exactly this shape: {"category":"food|drink|interior|exterior|staff|event","subject_description":"exhaustive visual description of the main subject — include specific colours, textures, quantity, plating style, visible sauces, garnishes, steam, condensation, or liquid","background_description":"detailed description of the background — table material and colour, objects visible, depth of field, any props or decorative elements","lighting":"precise description — colour temperature, direction, intensity, any visible sources such as candles or overhead lights, shadows and highlights","motion_elements":"3-4 specific physical elements visible in the image that could move in a video — be very specific, e.g. wisps of steam rising from the biryani, glistening sauce slowly spreading across the plate, condensation droplets on a cold glass","camera_move":"one specific cinematic camera motion, e.g. slow push-in toward the dish, gentle orbital drift around the glass, subtle tilt-up from table to food","mood":"one word: warm|lively|cosy|vibrant|elegant|rustic"}

values.content:
=Write an Instagram caption for a short video post for The Miners Arms, an Indian and Indo-Chinese restaurant in West Bromwich.

The video shows: {{ $('Build Video Prompt').item.json.category }} — {{ $('Build Video Prompt').item.json.main_subject }} in {{ $('Build Video Prompt').item.json.setting }}.

Tone: warm, lively, appetising, community-focused. Include 5-8 relevant hashtags (always include #MinersArms #WestBromwich #IndianFood). Maximum 100 words. Before returning, carefully proofread for any spelling mistakes, typos, or grammatical errors. Return only the corrected caption text, no explanation, no quotes.

parameters.text: You are a professional food and hospitality photographer's assistant working for The Miners Arms, a British pub in West Bromwich. Analyse this image carefully and return ONLY valid minified JSON, no commentary, no code fences, in exactly this shape: {"category":"food|drink|interior|exterior|staff|event","main_subject":"precise description of what is in the photo","setting":"brief description of the background/environment","composition":"how the subject is arranged/presented","improvements":["specific improvement 1","specific improvement 2"],"social_ready":true}. For improvements list up to 5 concrete visual enhancements such as lighting, steam, garnish, composition, colour saturation, or texture.

values.content:
=Write an Instagram caption for The Miners Arms, an Indian and Indo-Chinese restaurant in West Bromwich.

The image shows: {{ $('Build Image Prompt (Upload)').item.json.category }} — {{ $('Build Image Prompt (Upload)').item.json.main_subject }} in {{ $('Build Image Prompt (Upload)').item.json.setting }}.

Tone: warm, friendly, appetising, community-focused. Include 5-8 relevant hashtags (always include #MinersArms #WestBromwich #IndianFood). Maximum 100 words. Before returning, carefully proofread for any spelling mistakes, typos, or grammatical errors. Return only the corrected caption text, no explanation, no quotes.

description: Telegram-driven social posting bot for The Miners Arms. AI-generate path now fetches a random real gallery photo from the website and uses Gemini image editing to overlay branded social media graphics on it.
